claim: Context engineering is a supersetof prompt engineering that encompasses providing all information, examples, best practices, and constraints to AI coding assistants upfront
actionable: When building with AI coding assistants, spend time upfront engineering comprehensive context that goes beyond just tweaking prompts—include examples, best practices, constraints, and full reference documentation
source_title: Context Engineering 101 - The Simple Strategy to 100x AI Coding

claim: The PRP (Product Requirements Prompt) framework combines a PRD plus curated codebase intelligence plus agent runbook, aiming to be the minimum viable packet an AI needs to ship production-ready code on the first pass
actionable: Structure your AI coding context using the PRP framework: write a detailed initial.md describing your feature/product, include code examples and documentation references, then generate a comprehensive PRP before executing the build task
source_title: Context Engineering 101 - The Simple Strategy to 100x AI Coding

claim: Validation is critical in the PRP workflow—always read through generated PRPs and validate them before executing to ensure they reference the correct concepts and don't have tangled dependencies
actionable: After generating a PRP, spend time carefully reviewing the entire prompt, checking that it references the correct documentation and codebase patterns, and identifying any sections that need adjustment before execution
source_title: Context Engineering 101 - The Simple Strategy to 100x AI Coding

claim: claude.md should contain constant rules that rarely change (like naming standards and core patterns), while PRPs contain context specific to the current task being worked on
actionable: Separate your global configuration: put permanent codebase rules and standards in claude.md, and create individual PRPs for each feature or task that reference this base configuration
source_title: Context Engineering 101 - The Simple Strategy to 100x AI Coding

claim: The PRP framework works well on existing codebases because it combines codebase patterns with clear specifications, providing a strong foundation for AI systems to build consistent implementations
actionable: Use the PRP framework when working on feature development in existing codebases by including references to your current code patterns and architecture alongside the requirements
source_title: Context Engineering 101 - The Simple Strategy to 100x AI Coding

claim: Building an MCP server using the PRP framework approach from initial.md to generated PRP to execution typically takes about 10-15 minutes for PRP generation and 20-25 minutes for full implementation with validation
actionable: Plan for approximately 40 minutes total when using the PRP template approach to build an MCP server, with most time spent on PRP generation and implementation execution
source_title: Context Engineering 101 - The Simple Strategy to 100x AI Coding

claim: The PRP MCP-specific template is pre-engineered with context about MCP patterns, database setup, and tool registration, making it easier to build MCP servers than starting from scratch
actionable: Use specialized PRP templates for your specific use case (MCP servers, Next.js apps, etc.) rather than generic templates to reduce the context engineering burden
source_title: Context Engineering 101 - The Simple Strategy to 100x AI Coding

claim: Documentation and references in a PRP should include external sources like official documentation, existing codebase examples, and implementation patterns to give AI comprehensive context
actionable: When building your PRP, include multiple reference types: official documentation URLs, relevant code snippets from your existing codebase, and examples of similar implementations
source_title: Context Engineering 101 - The Simple Strategy to 100x AI Coding

claim: Better model capabilities (GPT-4 to Opus 4 to Mythos) enable longer context windows and more reliable PRP execution, with models like Claude 4 showing dramatic improvements in following complex PRPs
actionable: Use the most capable frontier models available for PRP generation and execution to ensure reliable multi-turn agentic workflows, as model quality directly impacts success rates
source_title: Context Engineering 101 - The Simple Strategy to 100x AI Coding

claim: Vibe coding (building without systematic process) creates prototypes that break at scale, while context engineering ensures production-ready code that 10x productivity
actionable: Commit to context engineering practices upfront rather than relying on ad-hoc prompting—the time investment in preparation directly correlates to code quality and scalability
source_title: Context Engineering 101 - The Simple Strategy to 100x AI Coding
